title: Izmaost's Glazed Terracotta
description: A full retexture of all the glazed terracotta into various tile designs
body:
## ⭐️Glazed Terracotta⭐️ Izmaost's Glazed Terracotta is a resource pack reworks all of the ugly glazed terracotta textures into more builder friendly tiles. Great for modern builds, bathrooms, kitchens and all sorts of applications!
## 📋 Requirements 📋 This pack does not require Optifine or any texture stitching mod to work. For any issues, questions or requests feel free to reach out on KoFi! ## 🎨 My Creations 🎨 Here you can find resourcepacks made by me: [Izmaost's Animated Foliage](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-animated-foliage) [Izmaost's Animated Flora](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-animated-flora) [Izmaost's Floral Redstone](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-floral-redstone) [Izmaost's Minimalist Redstone](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-minimalistic-redstone) [Izmaost's Modern Kitchen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-modern-kitchen) [Izmaost's Glazed Terracotta](https://modrinth.com/project/izmaosts-glazed-terracotta) [Izmaost's Softer Weather](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-softer-weather) [Izmaost's Autumnal Birch](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-autumnal-birch)
